description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job called test that runs in the default test stage. The job uses the default Docker image (no explicit image) and executes the following shell commands: apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y python3 python3-pip graphviz, pip3 install tox, and tox -e py35. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined, and the job runs on every pipeline.
